creator: trueos@norwegianrockcat.com
text:
Created attachment 195828
shar file for x11-fonts/firaGO

Since I'm the new maintainer for the x11-fonts/fira port, I figured I may as well add the port for FiraGO. FiraGO is an expanded version of Fira Sans with support for more languages. The foundry thought it was better to create a new font with all the additional support, so people could use both.
